name: Workleap
description: Self, peer, and manager reviews: Gather feedback that provides a 360 view of employee performance. Learn more about Workleap

reviews.review_title: We are very happy with Officevibe as it has provided us with up to date info on employee engagement
reviews.review_description: Up to the minute results of how our employees' level of engagement is.
reviews.review_pros: It is easy for the administrator to use and very easy for the employees to use. I like being able to read the feedback as well as see the group comparison numbers.
reviews.review_cons: Our employees have mentioned that sometimes it seems they are answering very similar questions, so it would be nice to have more control over the survey questions.

reviews.review_description: I use Didacte to present courses online to the general public. I can make my webcasts available again and even use the application to manage the registration of my workshop.
reviews.review_pros: Didacte is a perfect platform for online courses. It is possible to create different modules like questionnaires, videos, documents, which makes the online courses more interactive. You can create beautiful pages at low cost (no risk).
reviews.review_cons: I wish I could automatically synchronize new users with Mailchimp mailing list

reviews.review_description: Terrible. This is app is based on LIES. Not anonymous at all! Company’s will use to manipulate employees.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use, and I liked as an employee until I found out the app is not anonymous.
reviews.review_cons: It’s a scheme for employers to gain honest opinions by telling employees it’s anonymous. In fact, it’s not at all anonymous.

reviews.review_pros: As a working person I really need supportive feed-backs on the overall performances of the workers. So, for me this application is a blessing because it helps me in providing a continual feedback that assures that every single mistake can’t be denied. Moreover, this application provides new surveys each and every time in order to promote the employees engagement in a particular workspace.
reviews.review_cons: I appreciate each and every feature of OfficeVibe. I love its responsive team for answering all our queries immediately. Honestly speaking I do not have any complain about it.

reviews.review_title: A great tool to get feedback from your employees for how they actually feel.
reviews.review_description: Very positive, makes employees feel like they are a critical component in the team as well as allow managers to uncover any areas that need attention or changes.
reviews.review_pros: Very easy to use system to survey your employees to see how they actually feel about critical topics that affect your workplace culture and environment.
reviews.review_cons: It is hard to come up with any cons as this software works very well and doesn't really have any major flaws. I would say that it would be helpful if you had the option to type in your reasons for answering the questions if you had specific information that you wanted to expound on in each question page.

reviews.review_title: Awsome way to keep providing feedback about your company
reviews.review_pros: It just reminds you to fill a few questions every week. And answering those questions is easy, you have multiple choice
reviews.review_cons: There are lots of questions that require some free text. However, we can always skip them.

reviews.review_pros: - fast and easy to provide feedback - nice animations and the way to interact with ratings - weekly emails - nps score
reviews.review_cons: - Customer support was slow to understand the issue

reviews.review_title: Get your staff's pulse on everything worklife
reviews.review_pros: Very user friendly. The cute pictograms make it easier to understand each question at a glance. Also, it's a great tool to get a feel of everybody's opinion on all aspects of office life.
reviews.review_cons: I'd like to be able to see graphs and stats of what other people in my office answered.

reviews.review_title: Survey's are quick and it allows management to view how their team is doing without weekly 1:1's
reviews.review_pros: How easy it is to submit anonymous feedback and how quickly this feedback is shared with upper management. For our team the Slack integration seems to have increased survey responses and keeps management from forgetting to view feedback reports.
reviews.review_cons: The Slack integration has it's bugs, and users tend to forget this integration and try to sign in with their Google account instead.

reviews.review_pros: Its really simple to use Good support team Really cheap for what you get Risk free if it's your first time you try to sell your courses
reviews.review_cons: I don't like the way courses are presented for a user, but it's rather personal than problematic.

reviews.review_title: Barley has changed the game for our comp reviews & comp strategy
reviews.review_description: Overall, Barley has transformed how we manage compensation. We’re able to put more forethought into our company comp reviews, so that we can make effective and fair compensation changes and communicate them in a clear way to employees. Before Barley, we were doing salary planning and running company-wide compensation reviews manually with different spreadsheets which was time consuming and led to some out-dated information. With Barley, we’ve seen huge improvements in managing our compensation such as:- Time savings: Our team now completes comp reviews in 20% of the time in Barley compared to our old manual process- Managers empowered: During comp reviews, our managers have all the information and context they need to make fair, strategic pay recommendations. This includes clear visibility into their team budgets. - Increased pay transparency: Barley is the first place we visualized our pay bands. Now that it’s centralized in Barley, all key stakeholders can access it when they need it.Barley is now a key part of our compensation management structures and strategy.
reviews.review_pros: - Beautiful and easy-to-use platform- Quick implementation process. It took us a day to set it up, connect with our HRIS, and sync data over.- Highly customizable. We can adjust Barley to meet our needs and approach to compensation. (Ex. For their visualized pay bands, we can customize the departments, pay zones, currencies, job levels, etc.)- Automated workflows and approval chains for comp reviews. Barley has reduced the amount of admin work previously needed to manage comp reviews in spreadsheets for my team and our managers.
reviews.review_cons: - No critical features are missing and more features are coming out regularly

reviews.review_description: I've been using Oficevibe for about 4 years, I've seen them grow and develop their work. Their customer service is amazing, understands your needs as organization and business and resolve issues suuper quick! plus, they are suuper nice!
reviews.review_pros: There are so many good things about Officevibe, what I love the most it's how complete the reports are. You get such an open, transparent and detailed data. And the fact that you can access to that info. at any time it's the best! PLus, how interactive and beautiful the design of the surveys
reviews.review_cons: I don't think I can say there's a con for officevibe, but if I had to choose one, it would be that sometimes the platform can take its time loading some parts of the site, but it doesn't happen all the time.

reviews.review_title: This service has increased our employee engagement
reviews.review_pros: OfficeVibe takes the guessing game out of what our employees want, need and how to keep them engaged with their weekly easy to use surveys. Setting up OfficeVibe was simple and we have been able to work on trouble errors that we didn't even know were a problem. This software has given our management team insight into our staff and has given our staff a place to be honest about their feelings about the company, management, and their peers. The engagement report gives you a comparison of all teams and their standings from engagement to happiness and satisfaction. OfficeVibe puts out helpful articles about employee engagement and has excellent resources for improvement.
reviews.review_cons: OfficeVIbe has a feature where you can praise employees thru the site. You are given about 4 of your employees names and you pick an employee to give praise to. There is a question for you to answer and this is what I like least. The questions are the same every week. I would love to see more of a variety.

reviews.review_title: Very intuitive platform and easy to deploy
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: They quickly showed us the platform in a demo and it was so easy to set up that we were able to build our trainings from A to Z with barely any help. Good job team Didacte, we love the software!
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use Fully customizable Ability to integrate Quizzes to validate learning Import users feature
reviews.review_cons: The only downside for us was that we needed to commit for a year with a minimum of users. So if you have a short term need, that could be irritating.

reviews.review_description: It's really good and a good way to gauge what my company is looking to know about their employees.
reviews.review_pros: I like that our company uses this to get our feedback and overall satisfaction with our jobs. It is super easy to use because the questions are simple and on a rating scale and only ask open ended questions if you answer a certain way (at least, that's how ours is set up). But I like that you can skip if you don't feel comfortable answering any questions. It is also integrated with Teams, so each week it sends me a message with my new questions.
reviews.review_cons: There really isn't anything that I dislike about using OfficeVibe. I have had a great user experience with it in the time that I have been using it.

reviews.review_title: An app that does almost everything for you
reviews.review_pros: You have to do nothing and the app answers your collaborators a set of different questions each week/month. Integrates with slack
reviews.review_cons: The Slack integration has its bugs, and users tend to forget this integration and try to sign in with their Google account instead.

reviews.review_pros: It is a tool user friendly and not expensive.
reviews.review_cons: Not being able to give recognition to peers

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: We implemented Officevibe as our company has been struggling with employee engagement and morale issues. We have used various survey tools in the past but they always seemed to be skewed based on the day/time the person answered them, or only the disgruntled employees woudl fill them out. Officevibe takes care of that! The way the questions are worded allow for much more objective feedback and the metrics that you get out of the system are incredible. You can actually see on a day to day basis what the pulse of your organization is. We love Officevibe!
reviews.review_pros: Metrics, ease of use, anonymity, creativity
reviews.review_cons: I wish there was a way to choose/vary the questions based on what things we are hearing anecdotally are areas of concern. The surveys seem very random (maybe that's by design?) and there's really no real way to focus in on more specific areas of interest.

reviews.review_description: Didacte is a great platform to offer training online, on-site or live. Easy to set up and customize. Great support!
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use Pricing All-in-one solution
The service is perfect. I have respond and they take all the time we need and tell us the best product for us
reviews.review_cons: I would like to duplicate myself the training because I need to keep so video for others and I have to load each time

reviews.review_title: Great Way to Improve Office Culture
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: All and all Officevibe is an essential for every workplace. I have seen significant improvement in my company's culture in just a few weeks as management is taking the data acquired to heart.
reviews.review_pros: I love the surveys that are sent out to the users. The UI is done really well and the questions are quick with one fill in the blank question each time. The fill in the blank questions are anonymous and give the person issuing the survey to respond without revealing the person who asked the question's identity which is key when trying to get people to talk honestly about their workplace.
reviews.review_cons: Some of the fill in the blank questions don't really apply and sometimes you just want a to be able to express your thoughts without a specific question being asked that you need to answer.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Officevibe helps us to get frequent feedback, identify potential improvements and make sure that our employees stay happy.
reviews.review_pros: Slack Integration - the best. It reminds you to participate in the surveys and stay engaged.
reviews.review_cons: I can't mention anything right now. It's good!

reviews.review_title: Great Slack integration; Easy-to-complete surveys; Optional additional surveys
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: I like the Slack integration we have set up at my work. We all get the surveys randomly sent (during business hours). It's not very disruptive because they don't take long to complete. I like that you can see your progress and that the questions are really straight-forward. I also like that you can choose a category to complete more surveys in. I also like knowing that the questions were created by a 3rd party and aren't biased or leading questions written in-house.
reviews.review_cons: I don't think there's anything I don't like about it.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Provides keen insight on employees and the current "vibe" of the group allowing corrective action to be taken before a situation gets out of hand. Questions are short and to the point so employees actually use the tool.
reviews.review_pros: The user interface is modern, trendy and just all around nice to look at. The ability to customize questions is a nice touch and the anonymous feedback functionality inspires good confidence that employees can provide feedback without fear of reprisal.
reviews.review_cons: Like most software of this type you need minimum group sizes to get accurate data

reviews.review_title: Didacte has made creating professional training for my business simple and intuitive.
reviews.author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: The ability to provide a professional product that is easily changeable and adaptable at an affordable price.
reviews.review_cons: Almost nothing. It would be nice if there were more quiz options. For example, matching questions...where you link terms on the left with definitions on the right.
